exclusions_and_guards: Only current project record_ids present in data/canonical/projects.jsonl were considered.
Read current data/identity-overrides/merges.json; no proposed alias_id is already a project merge alias and no proposed target_id is a project merge alias.
Read current data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json; the only current project do-not-merge pair is project_better-buses-restart-2021 / project_jamaica-busway, and no proposed pair hits it.
Each proposed alias_id differs from its target_id and shares at least one current project global identity key with the target.
Excluded project_01-lexington-ave / project_lexington-ave-60th-52nd-offset-bus-lane because the records risk a corridor-segment trap: 96th-60th vs 60th-52nd Lexington Avenue scopes.

Excluded the 2017 Street Improvement Project cluster because project_2017-sip-woodhaven-blvd-cb5-sept2024, project_2017-street-improvement-79th, and project_79th-st-2017-improvement-cb7-apr2025 are same-generic-name but different street/location records.

Excluded 2020-2024 Capital Program Amendment #2/#5 records and Penn Reconstruction amendment/design records where the duplicate key could collapse amendment, design-service, and parent-program scopes without additional review.

Excluded CBDTP / TransCore / Congestion Relief Zone bond-resolution parent-child collisions except for no proposal; those records need policy on whether financing and contract actions should remain data-only child records.
Excluded B46/Utica, Bx12/Fordham, Hylan Boulevard, Jamaica Capacity Improvement phase records, East Side Access support, and similar phase/stage/parent-child collisions.
Excluded security-initiatives duplicates across LIRR and NYCT because they are same-name/different-agency records.

command_evidence.purpose: Read current merge aliases before proposing any project alias.
Read current do-not-merge guards before proposing any project alias.

command_evidence.command: node - <<'NODE' ... duplicate project identity keys from record_id plus record_aliases in data/canonical/projects.jsonl ... NODE
command_evidence.purpose: Read-only local reconstruction of the current validateRepo duplicate_global_identity backlog for project records without running materialize, validate, export, or provider-backed commands.

command_evidence.command: node - <<'NODE' ... inspect selected project records, payload fields, source_ids, evidence_refs, and raw block text ... NODE
command_evidence.purpose: Checked canonical and source evidence for candidate pairs and screened out phase/stage, same-name/different-location, and parent-program/child-project traps.

command_evidence.command: node - <<'NODE' ... guard check proposals against current projects.jsonl, merges.json, and do-not-merge.json ... NODE
command_evidence.purpose: Confirmed all proposed ids exist, no alias is already merged, no target is a merge alias, alias != target, and no do-not-merge guard is hit.
Captured UTC created_at for this prep artifact.

forbidden_commands_not_run: edits to manifests, canonical JSONL, canonical DB, wiki, submissions, or retired.json
